name: Chicken Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) Taco sauce or 1 cup Green chili salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped green onion in shortening until transparent.
2. Add shredded chicken, salsa or taco sauce, and salt. Heat to boiling.
3. Prepare taco shells according to package directions.
4. Fill each shell with 2 tablespoons of the chicken mixture and 1 tablespoon grated cheese.
5. Serve with optional toppings of lettuce, tomato, sour cream, guacamole, and extra chili sauce as desired.
